title: Garlic butter pasta
description: Simple, comforting — you already have most of this

steps.title: Boil water
steps.instruction: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.

steps.title: Cook pasta
steps.instruction: Add pasta and cook for 8-10 minutes until al dente. Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining.

steps.title: Sauté garlic
steps.instruction: While pasta cooks, mince garlic and sauté in olive oil and butter over medium heat for 2 minutes until golden.

steps.title: Combine
steps.instruction: Add drained pasta to the pan. Toss with garlic butter, adding pasta water as needed to create a silky sauce.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Plate the pasta and top generously with grated parmesan. Serve immediately.

steps.title: Prep vegetables
steps.instruction: Dice onion and bell pepper into bite-sized pieces. Drain and rinse chickpeas.

steps.title: Heat pan
steps.instruction: Heat olive oil in a large pan over high heat until shimmering.

steps.title: Cook onion
steps.instruction: Add onion and cook for 3 minutes until softened.

steps.title: Add chickpeas
steps.instruction: Add chickpeas and bell pepper. Stir-fry for 5 minutes until slightly crispy.

steps.title: Season and serve
steps.instruction: Season with soy sauce and your preferred spices. Serve hot over rice if desired.

steps.title: Sauté aromatics
steps.instruction: Dice onion and mince garlic. Sauté in a pot with olive oil for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Add tomatoes
steps.instruction: Add canned tomatoes and crush them with a spoon. Cook for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Add stock and rice
steps.instruction: Pour in vegetable stock and add rice. Stir well.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.instruction: Bring to a boil then reduce heat. Simmer for 18 minutes until rice is tender.

steps.title: Season and serve
steps.instruction: Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper. Serve hot.

steps.title: Beat eggs
steps.instruction: Crack 3 eggs into a bowl and beat well with a pinch of salt and pepper.

steps.title: Heat pan
steps.instruction: Heat olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.

steps.title: Cook eggs
steps.instruction: Pour in eggs and gently stir with a spatula as they cook. Remove from heat when just set.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Plate immediately and serve with toast or pita bread.

steps.title: Warm beans
steps.instruction: Drain and rinse black beans. Heat in a pan with cumin, salt, and a splash of water for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Warm tortillas
steps.instruction: Warm tortillas directly on the stovetop flame or in a dry pan for 30 seconds each side.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.instruction: Fill tortillas with beans, diced onion, and your favorite toppings like salsa, avocado, or hot sauce.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve immediately with lime wedges if available.

title: Lemon rice with garlic
description: Light side dish or simple main

steps.title: Cook rice
steps.instruction: Rinse rice and cook in 400ml water. Bring to boil then simmer covered for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Sauté garlic
steps.instruction: While rice cooks, mince garlic and sauté in olive oil for 2 minutes until golden.

steps.title: Combine
steps.instruction: Fluff cooked rice with a fork and add to the garlic pan. Squeeze lemon juice over top.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Toss everything together and serve warm. Season with salt and pepper to taste.

steps.title: Season beans
steps.instruction: Heat drained black beans with minced garlic, thyme, and a pinch of salt in a pot for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Add rice
steps.instruction: Add rinsed rice to the pot and stir to coat with the bean mixture.

steps.title: Add water
steps.instruction: Pour in 400ml water. Bring to a boil then reduce to lowest heat.

steps.title: Cook covered
steps.instruction: Cover tightly and cook for 18 minutes. Do not lift the lid.

steps.title: Rest and serve
steps.instruction: Remove from heat and let rest 5 minutes. Fluff with a fork and serve.

steps.title: Beat eggs
steps.instruction: Crack eggs into a bowl, add a pinch of salt and pepper, and beat until combined.

steps.title: Melt butter
steps.instruction: Melt butter in a non-stick pan over low heat.

steps.title: Scramble
steps.instruction: Add eggs and stir slowly with a spatula, folding as they cook. Remove while still slightly wet.

steps.title: Toast bread
steps.instruction: Toast bread to your liking.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve eggs on toast immediately.

steps.title: Cook pasta
steps.instruction: Cook pasta in well-salted boiling water until al dente. Reserve 1 cup pasta water.

steps.title: Sauté garlic
steps.instruction: Thinly slice garlic and cook in olive oil over medium-low heat until golden, about 3 minutes.

steps.title: Combine
steps.instruction: Add drained pasta to garlic oil. Toss vigorously, adding pasta water to create a sauce.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Plate immediately. Add red pepper flakes and parsley if available.

title: Haitian rice and beans
description: Diri ak pwa — a household staple

steps.title: Sauté aromatics
steps.instruction: Dice onion and mince garlic. Cook in olive oil for 3 minutes until soft.

steps.title: Add beans
steps.instruction: Add drained chickpeas. Season with thyme, salt, and pepper. Cook 2 minutes.

steps.title: Add rice and water
steps.instruction: Add rinsed rice and 400ml water. Stir once and bring to boil.

steps.title: Simmer covered
steps.instruction: Reduce to lowest heat, cover tightly, and cook for 20 minutes.

steps.title: Rest and serve
steps.instruction: Remove from heat, rest 5 minutes with lid on, then fluff and serve.

steps.title: Slice plantains
steps.instruction: Peel ripe plantains and slice diagonally into 1cm thick pieces.

steps.title: Heat oil
steps.instruction: Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat.

steps.title: Fry
steps.instruction: Fry plantain slices for 2-3 minutes per side until golden and caramelized.

steps.title: Drain and serve
steps.instruction: Drain on paper towels. Sprinkle with salt and serve hot.

steps.title: Prep
steps.instruction: Thinly slice half an onion. Beat 3 eggs with salt and pepper.

steps.title: Cook onion
steps.instruction: Melt butter in a pan and cook onion for 3 minutes until soft.

steps.title: Add eggs
steps.instruction: Pour beaten eggs over onions. Tilt pan to spread evenly.

steps.title: Fold and serve
steps.instruction: When edges set but center is still soft, fold in half and slide onto plate.

steps.title: Drain beans
steps.instruction: Drain and rinse chickpeas thoroughly.

steps.title: Prep vegetables
steps.instruction: Finely dice half an onion. Chop any fresh herbs if available.

steps.title: Dress
steps.instruction: Combine chickpeas and onion in a bowl. Drizzle with olive oil, lemon juice, salt and pepper.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Toss well and serve immediately or refrigerate for up to 2 days.

title: Garlic fried rice
description: Use up leftover rice in 10 minutes

steps.title: Heat oil
steps.instruction: Heat oil in a wok or large pan over high heat until very hot.

steps.title: Fry garlic
steps.instruction: Add minced garlic and fry for 30 seconds until fragrant.

steps.title: Add rice
steps.instruction: Add cold cooked rice and break up any clumps. Stir-fry for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Add eggs
steps.instruction: Push rice to sides, crack eggs into center, scramble, then mix everything together.

steps.title: Season and serve
steps.instruction: Season with soy sauce and salt. Serve hot.

steps.title: Cook pasta
steps.instruction: Cook pasta in salted boiling water until al dente, about 8-10 minutes.

steps.title: Reserve water
steps.instruction: Before draining, scoop out half a cup of pasta water. Then drain pasta.

steps.title: Add butter
steps.instruction: Return pasta to the pot off the heat. Add butter and toss until melted.

steps.title: Add parmesan
steps.instruction: Add grated parmesan and a splash of pasta water. Toss vigorously until creamy.

steps.title: Serve
steps.instruction: Serve immediately with extra parmesan on top.
